svg.title: Enoch software lineage from Lucy through Adam and Seth
svg.desc: A horizontal Git-like lineage showing Lucy as the minimal genome, Adam as the first functional agent, Seth as persistent work, and Enoch as governed evolution of the software body.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: Each generation inherits a versioned code body, then adds a new specialization.
